title: A New Home for Claims Management
author: Eric Gilkey
body:
Welcome to the redesigned web site for CLM’s Claims Management magazine. After more than six months of planning and design, it’s time for the ribbon to be cut. Here are some of the ways we hope the site will better serve you.

Simplified Navigation. We’ve grouped together important links and channels into two navigations bars across the top of the home page. The upper navigation bar provides you with information related to The CLM, digital editions, and how to contact us for both editorial and advertising inquiries. The bottom navigation bar allows you to choose an area of interest or line of business and read what we’ve published on the topic.

Sharing Content. “Liking” a feature and posting it on your Facebook wall, tweeting out a link to a column, or emailing an article to a colleague can be done with the click of a button, found at the top of every article.

What’s Hot? Find out what other CLM members and fellows are reading, locate our top columnists’ opinions quickly, and register for upcoming CLM webinars with our information console located on the upper-right corner of the home page.

Exclusively Online. Our web exclusive content is bolstered with video that shows you events in the world that have insurance and claims implications.

We’ll keep tidying up the place and constructing additions, but, in the meantime, we hope you like the refresh. As always, send me your thoughts and feedback at eric.gilkey@theclm.org.
